crafting-window: I can make your tools more powerful, but for extra gold.
instant-offer-text: Would you like to pay {cost}g to get your tool upgraded immediately?
post-purchase-dialogue: I'll be done in two days. Come back then.
speed-boost-cost-dialogue: Instant upgrade available! Additional cost: {costPercentage}% of upgrade cost.
not-enough-money: Not enough money for instant upgrade cost! Needed: {CostAmount}g
clint-insufficient-funds: Oops! You don't have enough money for the instant upgrade. I'll take care of this for you, come back in two days!
clint-thanks: Thanks. I hope you get a lot of use out of your upgraded tool!
clint-decline: Alright, I'll do it - come back in two days.
